title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same features as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider.

title: ollama-webui (Ollama-WebUI)
summary: Feature-rich web interface for Ollama (chat, model manager, RAG, multi-user).

title: ollama4j – Java Client
summary: Unofficial Java/Kotlin client providing synchronous & reactive APIs for Ollama.

title: ollama-rag – CLI RAG tool
summary: Lightweight CLI to chat with local PDFs/markdown using Ollama + vector DB.

title: ollama-copilot – VS Code extension
summary: Neovim plugin that adds Ollama-powered Copilot-style code completions and chat.

title: ollama-chat – React chat component
summary: Drop-in React component that streams Ollama chats via the ollama-js client.

title: ollama-helm – Kubernetes Helm charts
summary: Community Helm charts to deploy Ollama and WebUI on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-models – Curated model library
summary: Community-maintained Modelfile collection (Llama-3, CodeLlama, Vicuna, etc.).

title: Ollama Reddit community
summary: Active subreddit for sharing tips, models, integrations and troubleshooting Ollama.

title: Haystack Ollama Integration
summary: Deep-set Haystack 2.0 component to use Ollama generators & embedders in pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp – .NET client
summary: Unofficial C# client with async streaming and dependency-injection helpers.

title: Ollama on Hugging Face Spaces
summary: Official HF Space demo running Ollama in a Docker container with Gradio UI.
